heading: Tuesday Night
text: Variable clouds. Lows from upper 30s to mid 40s, except upper 40s to lower 50s in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys, and some mid 30s in the cold hollows east of the Greens. South to southeast winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph early in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly to partly sunny east of the Greens, becoming mostly cloudy west. Slight chance of a shower, mainly in the Adirondacks and St. Lawrence Valley. Highs in the upper 60s to lower 70s from the Champlain and Hudson valleys to the Connecticut Valley, mid to upper 60s elsewhere. Southeast winds 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Becoming cloudy, with a rising chance of showers, becoming likely west of the Greens after on midnight.  Lows in the low to mid 40s east of the Greens, mid to upper 40s west. Southeast winds 5 to 10 mph.
